name: IdsDmBClmMartClmLnExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH TRANSFORM_CTE AS (SELECT CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK'))) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, LN.CLM_ID, LN.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, @{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN LN LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON LN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_WEBDM_ETL_DRVR EXTR ON LN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = EXTR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE LN.CLM_ID = EXTR.CLM_ID) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM TRANSFORM_CTE
